# examplecloud Provider

!> This provider is deprecated.

The example provider.

Some note...

## Example Usage

### Basic

The basic configuration.

```terraform
provider "examplecloud" {
  name = "foo"
}
```

### Complete

The complete configuration.

```terraform
provider "examplecloud" {
  name    = "foo"
  address = "bar"
  age     = 123
  role    = "Software Engineer"
}
```
